chapter_title.en: Chapter on the Trimming or Shaving for the mutamatti‘, His Release From Ihram, and the Rulings for One Who Forgets to Trim Until He Engages in Intimacy or Commences the Hajj

text: 2749 - وَ رَوَى حَفْصٌ وَ جَمِيلٌ وَ غَيْرُهُمَا عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : فِي مُحْرِمٍ يُقَصِّرُ مِنْ بَعْضٍ وَ لاَ يُقَصِّرُ مِنْ بَعْضٍ قَالَ «يُجْزِيهِ».

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.2749 - Hafs, Jamil, and others narrated from Abu Abdullah (as) regarding a person in the state of ihram who trims some of their hair but not all of it.
Imam (as) said: "It suffices."
